buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 border border-slate-700 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.glass: bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl hover:border-emerald-500/30 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border border-slate-700 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/50 focus:border-emerald-500 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-500
inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-600 rounded-xl p-8 text-center hover:border-emerald-500 hover:bg-slate-900/50 transition-all cursor-pointer group

layout_strategies.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 to p-12 for sections. Gap-6 to Gap-8 for grids.

hero_bg.alt: Sleek black luxury car at night
hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or main visual

specific_instructions.header_nav: Fixed glassmorphic header (bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md). Logo left, Navigation right.
specific_instructions.footer: Dark slate background (bg-slate-950). Simple links. Copyright.
specific_instructions.forms: Multi-step wizard feel. Step 1: Vehicle Info. Step 2: Owner Info. Step 3: Uploads. Step 4: Payment. Use clear progress indicators.
specific_instructions.admin_dashboard: Sidebar layout. Main content area with summary cards (Total Revenue, Active Policies) and a Data Table for orders.
specific_instructions.animations: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance. Fade-in up for cards. Stagger children for lists.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-slate-300 has sufficient contrast on slate-900. Use text-white for critical info.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays for premium feel.
Interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
